roles.name: Royal Architect of Sweet Systems
roles.description: Designer of the kingdom's grand sugary architecture — owns the over-arching Salesforce solution.

roles.name: Hero of Ooo
roles.description: Marshals the band of adventurers, holds the timeline, and answers to the Princess.

roles.name: Royal Gumball Keeper
roles.description: Steward of records, layouts, fields and permission sets — keeps every gumball in its place.

roles.name: Master Candy Smith
roles.description: Forges Apex, LWC, and platform features in the Candy Kingdom workshops.

roles.name: Senior Candy Smith of the Citadel
roles.description: Senior smith with the deepest recipes — leads complex Apex and integration craft.

roles.name: Banana Guard Captain
roles.description: Captain of the kingdom's most senior practice — sets standards and trains the guard.

roles.name: Senior Adventurer of the Grass Lands
roles.description: Seasoned adventurer who patrols the borders of customer requirements with practiced skill.

roles.name: Adventurer Apprentice
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration across the realm under the senior adventurer's eye.

roles.name: Trainee Adventurer
roles.description: Newest member of the band — learns the ropes of configuration and discovery in the Grass Lands.

roles.name: Bridgemaster of the Bad Lands
roles.description: Architect of the great spans between Salesforce and the realms beyond Ooo.

roles.name: Senior Bridge Builder
roles.description: Lays the stones of API, middleware, and event flows under the Bridgemaster's plan.

roles.name: Apprentice Bridge Builder
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts and the dungeon-tested patterns.

roles.name: Royal Test Hero
roles.description: Tends the wounded build and finds the maladies before they reach the Princess.

roles.name: Royal Trumpet Herald
roles.description: Lifts the banner and trumpet for product and message — leads all marketing craft.

roles.name: Senior Town Crier
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — sounds the call across Ooo to gather and convert.

roles.name: Town Crier Apprentice
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the field — content, creative, and the daily ride.

roles.name: Royal Scribe of Mathematical!
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between mortal Customer and the wizardly craft of design.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries, future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Candy Kingdom — Sugar Sovereign CRM Rollout
Ice Kingdom — Frozen Realm Logistics Platform
Lumpy Space & Fire Kingdom — Drama Analytics Implementation

candy-kingdom.themedRole: Senior Adventurer of the Grass Lands

ice-kingdom.themedRole: Senior Candy Smith of the Citadel

candy-kingdom.name: Royal Decree of Kickoff
candy-kingdom.description: Discovery sign-off — Princess Bubblegum signs the royal decree.

candy-kingdom.name: Gumball Machine Ignition
candy-kingdom.description: Build kickoff: the great gumball machine rumbles to life.

candy-kingdom.name: Candy Census Review
candy-kingdom.description: Mid-project gate: Peppermint Butler audits the candy population.

candy-kingdom.name: Banana Guard Pay Cycle
candy-kingdom.description: Phase invoice trigger: the guards must be paid in pancakes.

candy-kingdom.name: Sugar Sovereign Go-Live
candy-kingdom.description: Go-Live: the new system crowns the Candy Kingdom.

candy-kingdom.name: Royal Hand-off
candy-kingdom.description: Hyper-care close: stewardship passed to Peppermint Butler.

ice-kingdom.name: Penguin Muster at Ice Castle
ice-kingdom.description: Project kickoff: the wenks gather in the great ice hall.

ice-kingdom.name: Ride to Frozen Lake
ice-kingdom.description: Build phase: the ice throne is hauled to its plinth.

ice-kingdom.name: Princess Trap Test
ice-kingdom.description: UAT gate: every princess-detection trap fires correctly.

ice-kingdom.name: Crown of Madness Activation
ice-kingdom.description: Go-Live: the Ice King wears the crown — system is live.

ice-kingdom.name: Return to the Lonely Tower
ice-kingdom.description: Hyper-care close: the king returns to his tower.

ice-kingdom.name: Final Wenk Reckoning
ice-kingdom.description: Final invoice: paid in penguin form.

nightosphere-vampires.name: The Bass Drops
nightosphere-vampires.description: Discovery: Marceline plays the opening riff.

nightosphere-vampires.name: Forge the Soul Vault
nightosphere-vampires.description: Build: the soul-storage vault is hammered into the obsidian wall.

nightosphere-vampires.name: Hunson Abadeer's Audit
nightosphere-vampires.description: Solution review with the Lord of Evil himself.

nightosphere-vampires.name: Soul Vault Activation
nightosphere-vampires.description: Go-Live: the Nightosphere is fully operational.

nightosphere-vampires.name: Soul-Sucking Suspended
nightosphere-vampires.description: Project close: surveillance shifted into hyper-care.

nightosphere-vampires.name: Final Soul Reckoning
nightosphere-vampires.description: Final invoice from the Nightosphere — payable in souls or USD.

lumpy-space-fire-kingdom.name: Council of Lumps & Flames
lumpy-space-fire-kingdom.description: Kickoff council in the lumpy lounge — drama inevitable.

lumpy-space-fire-kingdom.name: Gaze into the Flame Console
lumpy-space-fire-kingdom.description: Discovery: reports modelled from the flames themselves.

lumpy-space-fire-kingdom.name: Weave the Heat-Shield Reports
lumpy-space-fire-kingdom.description: Build: dashboards woven of fireproof thread.

lumpy-space-fire-kingdom.name: Drama Acceptance at LSP's Cloud
lumpy-space-fire-kingdom.description: UAT acceptance: LSP herself signs off — eventually.

lumpy-space-fire-kingdom.name: Royal Reveal Go-Live
lumpy-space-fire-kingdom.description: Go-Live + handoff: the kingdoms light up with insight.

lumpy-space-fire-kingdom.name: Final Dramatic Invoice
lumpy-space-fire-kingdom.description: Final invoice — sent with maximum lumpy drama.

Jake the Dog.notes: Family time with Lady Rainicorn and the pups.

Marceline the Vampire Queen.notes: Studio session — recording new bass tracks.

Lady Rainicorn.notes: Visiting parents in the Crystal Dimension.
